title: DryRunOutput
description: Output of migrate-util dry-run for a single (table, stage) pair. Guards are checked in order; content is populated only when all guards pass.

object_type.description: Catalog object type. Absent for legacy results where type was not detected.

guards_passed.description: True when every guard for this stage passed.

not_applicable.description: True when the stage does not apply to this object (e.g. a writerless table where writer-dependent stages are N/A). Implies guards_passed=false.

guard_results.description: Ordered list of guard check results. Short-circuits on first failure.

code.description: Error code when passed is false.

content.description: Stage-specific content. Present only when guards_passed is true. Shape varies by stage and --detail mode.
